title: Custome_Totem Skin
description: Adds a custom Totem of Undying texture based on your Minecraft skin, created with SKINMC. Simple, clean, and perfect for personalized gameplay.
body:
🪄 Realistic Custom Totem by anshuplaybeat 
This resource pack replaces the default Totem of Undying with your own custom skin — featuring a glowing realistic look based on this unique character (white hoodie, red eyes, and rainbow crown).
🎨 Features:
Realistic and HD-style totem texture
Uses your personal Minecraft skin
Works perfectly on Minecraft 1.21 / 1.21.1
Lightweight — no performance loss
💡 Recommended for:
Custom SMPs, PvP servers, and content creators who want their totem to look unique and personal.
🧩 Compatibility:
Works on Vanilla, Fabric, and OptiFine
Minecraft version: 1.21+
📦 Pack format: 34
🖌️ Credits
Totem texture generated using SKINMC.
Pack assembled and customized by anshu078_ for Modrinth release.
All original skin rights belong to their respective creators.
